body:
No performance regressions detected in this PR. The only new runtime cost introduced is a `readFileSync("/proc/meminfo")` call inside an `ObservableGauge` callback — this runs at the metric export interval (default 60 s), reads from a kernel virtual file in ~10–50 µs, and has no measurable impact on throughput, latency, or memory.
